learner.account.overview.intro: Your subscription, performance, and study tools in one place. Use the sidebar to jump to a section.
learner.dashboard.title: Dashboard
learner.dashboard.subtitle.locked: Subscribe to unlock the full question bank, lessons, mocks, and readiness tracking.
learner.dashboard.subtitle.subscriber: Momentum, pathways, and practice signals — then open Account for billing and preferences.
learner.dashboard.commandCenter.title: Your study snapshot
learner.dashboard.commandCenter.subtitle: Real numbers from your plan: streak, bank accuracy, lesson pool, and mock attempts.
learner.dashboard.commandCenter.streakHi: UTC days with lessons, graded work, or mocks
learner.dashboard.commandCenter.bankHint: Finish graded bank or mock items to unlock accuracy
learner.dashboard.commandCenter.lessonsH: Completed vs lessons available in your plan
learner.dashboard.readinessBandExplain.i: We are still collecting graded practice and mock data. Complete a few more timed blocks so this score reflects your true range.
learner.dashboard.readinessBandExplain.n: Signals show gaps versus exam-day expectations. Prioritize weak-topic drills and rationales before long marathon sessions.
learner.dashboard.readinessBandExplain.i: Trajectory is positive—keep pairing new questions with short review of misses so gains stick.
learner.dashboard.readinessBandExplain.n: You are close: tighten consistency on your lowest topics and validate with full mocks under time pressure.
learner.dashboard.readinessBandExplain.r: Practice and mock signals align with strong exam-day readiness. Maintain mix of review and fresh items as your date approaches.
learner.dashboard.categoryBreakdown.hint: Bar colors: strong (green) → on track (blue) → developing (amber) → needs focus (rose).
learner.dashboard.recentPerformance.subt: Trend from your graded sessions and mocks.
learner.dashboard.recentPerformance.noAc: Complete a graded bank block or mock to unlock session accuracy here.
learner.dashboard.recentPerformance.noTr: A bit more activity will unlock a plain-language trend line.
learner.dashboard.examHistory.title: Exam history
learner.dashboard.examHistory.subtitle: Latest mock attempts — watch the trend, not one score.
learner.dashboard.performanceTrend.chart: Percent correct on full mocks (5+ items), oldest to newest.
Complete at least two scored mocks with five or more questions each to see your line chart.
Line chart of mock exam scores: {{points}}
learner.dashboard.progressSummary.title: Progress summary
learner.dashboard.progressSummary.subtit: How your lesson pool and bank work are tracking.
learner.dashboard.progressSummary.streak: Start a streak — any study day counts
learner.dashboard.quickActions.title: Quick actions
learner.dashboard.quickActions.subtitle: Jump back into practice, lessons, or your reports.
learner.dashboard.masteryKey.title: How to read topic strength
learner.adv.strip.card1.title: Learn, then drill
learner.adv.strip.card1.body: Pathway lessons connect to your question bank and weak-area signals—study content and practice stay aligned.
learner.adv.strip.card2.title: Adaptive practice
learner.adv.strip.card2.body: Topic-adaptive and weak-pool sessions adjust to your performance—not a static quiz deck.
learner.adv.strip.card3.title: Readiness & trends
learner.adv.strip.card3.body: One score blends lessons, graded practice, and mocks—see what is lifting or limiting you before test day.
learner.dailyGoal.title: Today's goal
learner.dailyGoal.subtitle: Three light credits: practice, adaptive session, or lesson work—finish any mix that fits your day.
learner.dailyGoal.complete: Today's goal is complete. Consistency beats cramming—you're building exam-day stamina.
learner.dailyGoal.encourage: Pick one small action: a short bank block, one lesson step, or a weak-focused practice test. Small wins stack.
learner.dailyGoal.utcNote: Day and streak use UTC so they stay consistent when you travel.
learner.dailyGoal.resumeFallback: Open your lessons hub to pick up where you left off.
learner.dailyGoal.resumeAlt: Or jump into the question bank →
learner.dailyGoal.microReward: Nice—today's goal is in. We'll keep the next step ready when you come back.
learner.dailyGoal.improveTopic: Your data still flags {{topic}}—short, targeted reps beat rereading everything.
learner.dailyGoal.questionsComplete: You have reached today's question target. Steady reps build automatic recall.
learner.dailyGoal.questionsEncourage: Each graded question updates your weak-area signals—short sessions count.
learner.dailyGoal.setGoalLink: Adjust daily target in Personal info →
learner.retention.reminderContinue: When you return, we'll point you to the last lesson or practice test you touched.
learner.retention.reminderWeak: When your data shows a weak area, we surface lessons and drills in Focus below.
learner.retention.streakProtectShort: Your streak is active — earn at least one study credit today (UTC) so it keeps climbing.
learner.retention.personalMinutesHint: You set about {{n}} minutes per session in your profile. Three small credits still move the needle.
learner.retention.continueSub: Jump back to a lesson, a track hub, or your last mock — all from data we already have.
learner.retention.stripStreakHint: Study any day (UTC) to grow your streak.
learner.adaptive.title: Your focus
learner.adaptive.source.ledger: Ranked from your graded question history—no guesswork.
learner.adaptive.source.mixed: Blends your bank ledger with recent mock signals where the ledger is still thin.
learner.adaptive.source.fallback: We need a bit more graded practice to personalize this list.
learner.adaptive.smallWin: {{topic}} is holding steady at about {{rate}}% accuracy—keep mixing in weak-topic reps.
learner.adaptive.emptyState: Answer a few more graded questions or finish a mock; we will surface weak areas and next steps automatically.
learner.sessionInsight.struggle: Most misses in this session clustered around: {{topics}}.
learner.sessionInsight.focusTopicDrill: When you are ready, a short question drill on {{topic}} matches what this run showed.
learner.practiceTest.insight.focus: Next, bias practice toward those topics in the bank, then revisit lessons if anything still feels fuzzy.
learner.practiceTest.results.weakHint: Each topic is grounded in this session’s results—open lessons or a topic drill next.
learner.dashboard.signedOutHint: Sign in to open your dashboard.
learner.dashboard.accountTeaser: Billing, password, exam date, and UI preferences live in Account.
learner.dashboard.insight.readinessSubti: Blended from lessons, graded practice, and mock performance in your plan.
learner.dashboard.insight.scorePending: Score appears after more graded practice or mock attempts.
learner.dashboard.insight.categoryHint: Top topics from your recent graded activity (indicative, not a pass guarantee).
learner.dashboard.insight.categoryEmpty: Answer more graded questions to see topic-level accuracy here.
learner.dashboard.insight.weakHint: From your latest blended performance analysis.
learner.dashboard.insight.weakEmpty: No labeled weak areas yet. Keep practicing—we will surface priorities automatically.
learner.dashboard.insight.recentHint: Newest first (up to five attempts). Links open the full attempt report.
learner.dashboard.insight.recentEmpty: No mocks logged yet. Complete a mock from Practice exams to see scores and links here.
learner.dashboard.hub.readinessDeferHint: Readiness factors and score are summarized in the card above. This section still tracks lesson completion and recent session accuracy.
learner.dashboard.student.activityHint: Mocks, notes, and your study streak.
learner.dashboard.student.activityEmpty: Finish a lesson, a question set, or a mock to see activity here.
learner.account.reportCard.title: Report card
learner.account.reportCard.intro: A single view of graded practice, mock exams, pathway lesson progress, and topic signals. Sections show “not enough data” when we do not have graded items yet.
learner.account.reportCard.lockedBody: Subscribe to log mock attempts and build a report card.
learner.account.reportCard.empty: No attempts yet. Start a mock from Practice exams.
learner.reportCard.bankSessionsDetail: {correct} correct of {total} graded items across {sessions} sessions.
learner.reportCard.bankSessionsNa: No graded bank or exam-session items in your recent history yet. Complete a timed or tutor session to populate this.
learner.reportCard.loadFailed: We could not load your report card right now. Try again shortly.
learner.reportCard.mockNa: No scored mock attempts yet. Start a practice exam to see accuracy here.
learner.reportCard.mockTierNa: No mock attempts grouped by exam track yet.
learner.reportCard.next.catBody: Use full mocks for exam-length rehearsal, or the practice-test builder for adaptive (CAT) runs when your plan includes them.
learner.reportCard.next.lessonsNa: No in-progress lesson detected. Open lessons to continue your pathway.
learner.reportCard.next.questionsNa: Topic-level drill needs a bit more graded history. Open the bank and practice by system.
learner.reportCard.overallEmptyHint: Start with a few graded bank items or a mock — your report card will fill in as you go.
learner.reportCard.pathwaysNa: No pathway lesson progress recorded yet for your subscription scope.
learner.reportCard.practiceTestsNa: No completed practice tests yet. Finish a CAT or fixed-length test to see results here.
learner.reportCard.questionTierNa: Not enough recent graded session items to break down accuracy by question tier (RN / LPN / NP, etc.).
learner.reportCard.recentBankNa: No recent graded sessions with scored items.
learner.reportCard.section.mockTierSub: Groups your mock attempts by the exam’s pathway tier (RN, RPN/LPN, NP, allied).
learner.reportCard.section.mockTrendSub: Weekly average score on mocks when we have attempts in more than one week.
learner.reportCard.section.nextStepsSub: Based on your current progress and weak signals — not a guarantee of exam outcome.
learner.reportCard.section.overallSub: Bank accuracy uses graded items from recent completed sessions; mock accuracy uses scored full-exam attempts.
learner.reportCard.section.pathwaysSub: Lesson completion by pathway — separate from question-bank accuracy.
learner.reportCard.section.practiceTests: Adaptive (CAT) and other practice tests you have completed.
learner.reportCard.section.questionTierS: From your latest graded session items (bank questions), grouped by item tier.
learner.reportCard.section.recentBankSub: Latest completed sessions with scored items.
learner.reportCard.section.strongTopicsS: Topics with stronger accuracy where we have enough attempts to say so.
learner.reportCard.section.trendsSub: Short notes when we detect improving, declining, or stable patterns.
learner.reportCard.section.weakTopicsSub: Higher miss rates where we have graded evidence.
learner.reportCard.strongNa: No strong topics identified yet — keep practicing to build a clearer picture.
learner.reportCard.trendNa: Trend needs mock attempts in at least two different weeks. Keep testing — we will chart it when there is enough spread.
learner.reportCard.weakNa: No weak topics flagged yet from graded history.
learner.account.readiness.title: Passing probability & readiness
learner.account.readiness.intro: A blended signal from lessons, graded practice, and mocks — indicative only, not a pass guarantee.
learner.account.readiness.empty: Complete more graded question bank or mock sessions to unlock a sharper readiness picture.
learner.readinessPage.catNone: No completed CAT-style practice tests yet. When you finish adaptive runs, we show accuracy here for context (the headline index still uses mocks and bank practice in its formula).
learner.readinessPage.catSummary: {n} completed CAT session(s). Average accuracy where scored: {pct}%.
Why this feels different from a question-only bank
This index blends pathway lesson progress, graded bank and mock performance, and topic load from your weak areas—so it reflects study and practice together, not isolated quiz scores.
learner.readinessPage.confidenceExplaine: Confidence reflects how much graded practice and mock history we have, not clinical certainty.
learner.readinessPage.consistencyNote: Mock score spread across attempts is folded into the mock factor when you have multiple exams — wide swings temper the headline index.
learner.readinessPage.formula.lessons: Lesson completion vs lessons available in your plan pool.
learner.readinessPage.formula.mocks: Recent mock exams (attempts with at least five scored items each).
learner.readinessPage.formula.practice: Accuracy on graded items from recent completed question-bank and exam sessions (your plan scope).
learner.readinessPage.formula.renormaliz: If a signal is missing (for example, no mocks yet), its weight is left out and the index is renormalized so you are not penalized with unexplained empty points.
learner.readinessPage.formula.topics: Topic error load from priority weak areas (ledger + sessions).
learner.readinessPage.indexFootnote: This number is a NurseNest readiness index (0–100), not a published passing probability.
learner.readinessPage.noGradedPractice: No graded bank items in recent completed sessions yet.
learner.readinessPage.noMocks: No mock attempts on file yet.
learner.readinessPage.section.catSub: Adaptive (CAT) practice tests you have completed — shown for transparency; the headline score above does not add a separate CAT weight.
learner.readinessPage.section.consistenc: Study streak and how mock variability affects the mock portion of your index.
learner.readinessPage.section.formulaSub: Matches the server-side blend in `computeReadiness` — weights apply when each signal qualifies.
learner.readinessPage.section.mocksSub: Newest scored mocks (same pool used in the mock factor when eligible).
learner.readinessPage.section.signalsSub: Point contributions after your data qualifies for each signal.
learner.readinessPage.section.weakSub: From unified topic performance. Use questions for targeted drills; lessons for structured review.
learner.readinessPage.streakCaption: Consecutive calendar days (UTC) with any study signal in the last 90 days.
learner.readinessPage.weakEmpty: No weak topics surfaced yet. Complete more graded questions so we can prioritize systems for you.
learner.account.progress.title: Progress
learner.account.progress.intro: Pathway completion, practice accuracy, flashcards, and recent mocks in one scrollable view.
learner.progressPage.continueEmpty: No in-progress lesson on file. Open your lesson list to start or resume.
learner.progressPage.continueSub: Pick up the lesson you last touched in your plan scope.
learner.progressPage.examsCardSub: Practice tests (including CAT) and full mock exams — recent scores only.
learner.progressPage.lessonsCardSub: Across content and pathway lessons in your subscription scope.
learner.progressPage.lessonsPoolNote: {{available}} lessons available in your pool (content + pathways).
learner.progressPage.pathwaysEmpty: No pathway rows for your plan yet. When pathways publish for your tier and region, cards will appear here.
learner.progressPage.pathwaysSub: RN, RPN/LPN, NP, and allied tracks you can access — lesson counts per pathway catalog.
learner.progressPage.questionsAccuracyHi: Correct ÷ attempts in your topic stats ledger.
learner.progressPage.questionsCardSub: Topic ledger totals plus your latest graded exam sessions (plan-scoped).
learner.account.billing.title: Subscription & billing
learner.account.billing.intro: Plan status and Stripe Customer Portal when your subscription is billed through Stripe.
learner.billingPage.accessActive: Your subscription is active for this tier and country scope.
learner.billingPage.accessInactive: No active paid subscription on file. You may still have limited trial or free previews where offered.
learner.billingPage.accountToolsSub: Password and legal links. Use Manage billing above for cards and invoices when Stripe is linked.
learner.billingPage.billingIntervalHint: Exact interval is confirmed in Stripe after checkout. Open Manage billing to see your invoice cycle.
learner.billingPage.billingSub: Renewal dates and billing period come from Stripe when we can read them. Nothing here is a legal invoice.
learner.billingPage.cancelAtPeriodEnd: Your subscription is set to cancel at the end of the current period. You keep access until that date.
learner.billingPage.includes.allied.1: Allied health question bank and lessons aligned to your profession context.
learner.billingPage.includes.allied.2: Practice tests and flashcards where included for your tier.
learner.billingPage.includes.common.1: Question bank, graded sessions, and study tools scoped to your subscription country and tier.
learner.billingPage.includes.common.2: CAT-style and fixed-length practice tests when your plan includes them.
learner.billingPage.includes.np.1: NP-level questions, lessons, and exam-style simulations for your track.
learner.billingPage.includes.np.2: Advanced practice content scoped to your pathway where configured.
learner.billingPage.includes.np.3: Readiness and progress views based on your graded activity.
learner.billingPage.includes.nursing.1: NCLEX-oriented lessons and pathway progress for your nursing tier (RN, RPN, or LPN/LVN).
learner.billingPage.includes.nursing.2: Full question bank and topic drills within your plan scope.
learner.billingPage.includes.nursing.3: Mock exams and practice tests compatible with your subscription.
learner.billingPage.interval.unknown: See Stripe Customer Portal for cycle details
learner.billingPage.noSubscriptionRow: No Stripe subscription row stored yet.
learner.billingPage.pathwaysEmpty: Subscribe to unlock pathway hubs for your region, or contact support if you believe this is wrong.
learner.billingPage.planSub: Effective tier and country drive lessons, questions, and exams you can open.
learner.billingPage.policiesSub: Terms, privacy, refunds, and how to reach us.
learner.billingPage.portalError: We could not open the billing portal. Try again shortly or contact support.
learner.billingPage.portalUnavailable: A Stripe customer is not linked to this account yet. Subscribe from Plans & pricing, or contact support if you already paid.
learner.billingPage.renewalHint: Renewal timing appears here after Stripe sync. You can always confirm in the Customer Portal.
learner.billingPage.renewalUnknown: Not available from Stripe right now
Payment is current and your plan matches the access you see in the app. Use Manage billing in Stripe to update cards or download invoices.
learner.billingPage.surface.admin.body: Admin accounts have full access for operations. Billing for personal study plans does not apply here.
learner.billingPage.surface.admin.title: Administrator access
learner.billingPage.surface.cancelled.bo: This subscription is cancelled in our records. If you recently paid again, allow a few minutes for sync or contact support with your reference id below.
learner.billingPage.surface.grace.body: You still have access during a grace window while billing catches up. Update payment in Stripe soon to avoid interruption.
learner.billingPage.surface.grace.title: Grace period
learner.billingPage.surface.inactive.bod: Start a plan from Pricing to unlock the full bank, lessons, and mocks. If you believe you already subscribed, contact support with the reference below.
learner.billingPage.surface.past_due.bod: Stripe reports an overdue payment. Open Manage billing to fix your payment method and restore uninterrupted access.
learner.billingPage.surface.trial.body: You are in a trial window where offered. When the trial ends, subscribe to keep full access.
learner.billingPage.surface.trial.title: Trial access
learner.billingPage.surface.trial_ending: Your trial is close to ending. Choose a plan to continue without losing momentum.
learner.billingPage.verifyFailed: We could not verify subscription status. You can still review this page; try again shortly or contact support.
learner.account.personal.title: Personal information
learner.account.personal.intro: What we store on your learner profile today.
learner.account.personal.supportHint: Need to change your email or merge accounts? Contact support and we will help securely.
learner.account.personal.securityBody: Update your NurseNest password or use email reset from the security page.
learner.personalPage.section.identitySub: How you appear in the app and how we reach you.
learner.personalPage.emailReadOnly: Email is tied to sign-in. To change it, contact support so we can verify you safely.
learner.personalPage.section.regionSub: Scopes lessons, the question bank, and practice to your licensing context.
learner.personalPage.regionLocked: Your active subscription sets country and exam tier. Update them through billing or contact support.
learner.personalPage.regionHint: Changing country or tier updates which exam pathways you can select below.
learner.personalPage.section.pathwaySub: The track we use for lessons, bank scope, and practice defaults.
learner.personalPage.pathwayHint: Options depend on your country and tier. If you change region or tier, the list refreshes automatically.
learner.personalPage.section.studySub: Optional notes we can use to tailor your experience (not shared publicly).
learner.personalPage.dailyQuestionGoalHi: How many bank questions to aim to grade per day (UTC). Leave blank to use the default (20). Range 5–120.
learner.personalPage.dailyQuestionGoalIn: Enter a whole number between 5 and 120, or leave blank for the default.
learner.personalPage.section.examPlanSub: Managed on the study preferences page so dates and targets stay in sync everywhere.
learner.personalPage.saveError: Could not save. Check your connection and try again.
learner.personalPage.entitlementWarning: We could not fully verify subscription status. You can still edit; if something looks wrong, refresh or try again shortly.
learner.account.settings.title: Settings
learner.account.settings.intro: Appearance and language for the app shell (saved on this device).
learner.account.settings.themeBody: Light, dark, or follow your system. Matches the control in the top bar.
learner.account.settings.languageBody: Study tool and account copy. Same list as the header language control.
learner.account.security.title: Security & password
learner.account.security.intro: Keep your NurseNest password strong. OAuth-only accounts can set a password via email reset.
learner.security.section.passwordSub: Uses your current password. After a successful change you will be signed out here and should sign in again.
learner.security.section.resetSub: Same secure flow as “Forgot password” on the sign-in page.
learner.security.resetBody: If you cannot remember your password, we will email a one-time link. The link expires after a short time. If you sign in with Google or another provider only, use this once to create a NurseNest password.
learner.security.sessionExplain: NurseNest keeps you signed in with an encrypted browser cookie (about {{days}} days). It is not shared with other sites. We do not show a list of devices or browsers.
learner.security.sessionOtherDevices: After you change your password, this browser signs out automatically. On any other device or browser, open NurseNest and choose Sign out if you no longer want that session, or simply sign in again when the old session expires.
learner.security.trouble1: Confirm you are using the same email you registered with, or your username if you set one.
learner.security.trouble2: Try an incognito or private window to rule out extensions or old cookies.
learner.security.trouble3: Request a new reset link from the forgot-password page; older links stop working after use or when they expire.
learner.security.trouble4: Make sure your device clock is roughly correct; extreme skew can break some secure flows.
learner.security.noPasswordBefore: This account does not use a NurseNest password yet. Use
learner.security.noPasswordAfter: with your email to set one.
learner.security.passwordPolicyHint: Use at least 8 characters with a letter and a number.
learner.accountActions.billingBody: Update payment method, view invoices, or cancel in Stripe’s secure portal when your plan is billed through Stripe.
learner.accountActions.policiesBodyWithP: Subscription terms, privacy, refunds, and how to reach us. For payment updates or cancellation, use Manage billing in Stripe above.
learner.accountActions.policiesBodyNoPor: Subscription terms, privacy, refunds, and how to reach us. For payment updates or cancellation, use Stripe after you subscribe.
learner.account.studyPreferences.title: Study preferences
learner.account.studyPreferences.intro: Exam date, target pathway, cadence, and allied profession context — used to tune recommendations.
learner.startStudying.ctaBody: Unlock the full bank, lessons, and review tools on your pathway.
learner.startStudying.ctaTitle: Go deeper when you are ready
learner.startStudying.firstLessonEmpty: Lessons for this pathway are on the way. Jump into questions or open your study hub.
learner.startStudying.heroSubtitle: Your pathway is set. Pick up where new subscribers get the fastest win: one lesson, then a short question set.
learner.studySettings.section.appearance: Matches the header controls. Theme and language apply across the learner app.
learner.studySettings.section.pathwaySub: Scopes the question bank and lessons. Edited with your account profile.
learner.studySettings.section.qbankSub: Starting session size and whether new runs feel like study or exam-style review.
learner.studySettings.practiceModeHint: Study: rationales after you check each answer. Exam-style: explanations stay tucked away until you choose to reveal them (closer to test-day pacing).
learner.studySettings.section.practiceEx: Which option we show first when you start a session (you can always pick the other).
learner.studySettings.deviceNote: Stored locally in your browser so the question bank and practice exam pickers open the way you like. Clearing site data resets them.
learner.studySettings.section.examPlanLo: Exam date, study cadence, and target pathway for recommendations are available with an active plan.
learner.studySettings.notificationsBody: We send essential account, billing, and security messages. Marketing email preferences are not configurable in the app yet — contact support if you need changes.
learner.practiceTests.run.subtitleLocked: Ang mga pagsusulit na may oras at hindi napapanahon ay kasama sa isang aktibong plano.
learner.practiceTests.run.title: Pagsusulit sa pagsasanay
learner.practiceTests.subtitle.locked: Bumuo ng mga napapanahon o hindi napapanahon na mga pagsubok mula sa iyong pool ng tanong, i-save ang pag-unlad, at suriin ang mga marka na may mga breakdown ng paksa, kasama ng isang aktibong plano.
learner.practiceTests.subtitle.subscribe: I-configure ang haba, mga paksa, kahirapan, at mode ng pagpili. Magpatakbo ng mga naka-time o hindi napapanahon na mga session, awtomatikong i-save habang nagpapatuloy ka, ipagpatuloy ang mga hindi kumpletong pagsubok, at suriin ang mga marka na may mga breakdown sa bawat paksa at mga link sa mahinang lugar.
learner.practiceTests.title: Mga pagsusulit sa pagsasanay
learner.profile.access.verifyUnknown: Hindi ma-verify ang status ng subscription.

learner.profile.intro: Pamahalaan ang iyong pag-sign in, subscription, at tingnan kung paano ka gumaganap. Pagkatapos ay tumalon sa iyong susunod na sesyon.

learner.profile.performanceGate.body: Mag-subscribe upang i-unlock ang buong lesson pool, ang question bank, CAT practice tests, flashcards, at readiness tracking.
learner.profile.performanceGate.heading: Pagganap
learner.profile.quickLinks.heading: Mabilis na mga link
learner.profile.quickLinks.subtitle: Tumalon sa iyong mga tool sa pag-aaral.
learner.profile.readiness.calibrationNot: Aktibo ang konserbatibong pagkakalibrate para sa track ng pagsusulit na ito.
learner.profile.readiness.helpingFallbac: Patuloy na magsanay. Ang mga signal ay tatalas.

learner.profile.readiness.nextStepsLead: Pick one action now. Your score updates after each graded session.
learner.profile.signedOutHint: Mag-sign in upang pamahalaan ang iyong account.
learner.profile.snapshot.scoredEmpty: Tapusin ang isang bangko o bloke ng pagsasanay na pagsusulit

learner.profile.title: Profile at account
learner.profile.topics.emptyStrong: Lumalabas ang malalakas na paksa pagkatapos ng sapat na namarkahang dami bawat paksa.
learner.profile.topics.emptyWeak: Wala pang signal ng mahinang paksa. Kumpletuhin ang graded bank block o practice test para ma-populate ang listahang ito.
learner.profile.topics.heading: Malakas at mahinang paksa
learner.profile.topics.subtitle: Mula sa graded question bank, practice tests, at pangungutya.
learner.qbank.api.accessVerifyFailed: Hindi namin ma-verify ang iyong access (nabigo ang pagsusuri sa subscription). I-refresh sa ilang sandali. Ito ay karaniwang pansamantala, hindi isang paywall block.
learner.qbank.api.genericLoadFailure: Hindi ma-load ang mga tanong. Suriin ang iyong koneksyon at subukang muli.
learner.qbank.api.noActiveSubscription: Walang aktibong subscription sa account na ito. Pumili ng plano para gamitin ang buong question bank.
learner.qbank.api.previewsExhausted: Naubos na ang mga komplimentaryong preview. Mag-subscribe para sa ganap na pag-access sa bangko at mga katwiran.
learner.qbank.api.signInAgain: Kailangan mong mag-sign in muli para i-load ang question bank.
learner.qbank.api.subscriberListBlocked: Hindi mabuksan ng account na ito ang listahan ng tanong ng subscriber gamit ang kasalukuyang plano o session.
learner.qbank.api.tempUnavailable: Pansamantalang hindi available ang question bank (isyu sa database o serbisyo). Subukan muli sa isang sandali.
learner.qbank.discovery.accessVerifyFail: Hindi ma-verify ang access para sa mga filter ng paksa. I-refresh sa ilang sandali.
learner.qbank.discovery.generic: Hindi ma-load ang menu ng paksa; subukang i-refresh.
learner.qbank.discovery.notAvailable: Hindi available ang pagtuklas ng paksa para sa account o planong ito.
learner.qbank.discovery.serverIssue: Hindi ma-load ang listahan ng paksa (pansamantalang isyu sa server o database).
learner.qbank.discovery.signIn: Mag-sign in upang i-load ang mga filter ng paksa para sa iyong bangko.
learner.qbank.discovery.subscriptionRequ: Ang menu ng paksa ay nangangailangan ng aktibong subscription; maaari ka pa ring gumamit ng mga preview sa ibang lugar.
learner.qbank.efficiency.highYield: Mataas ang ani / mas mahirap na mga item
learner.qbank.examUi.enrichmentNotice: Rationale available but needs enrichment. We’re expanding explanations across the bank.
learner.qbank.examUi.noRationale: No explanation is on file for this item yet.
learner.qbank.examUi.toolsHint: Use ∅ to strike out and H to highlight while you think—optional, like paper.
learner.qbank.rationale.wrongOptionsHead: Why the other options are wrong
learner.qbank.rationale.verdictCorrectSu: Nice work—read the rationale below to reinforce the concept.
learner.qbank.rationale.verdictIncorrect: Review the correct reasoning and compare it to your choice.
learner.qbank.rationaleLinks.heading: Related lessons
learner.qbank.filters.incorrectOnlyHint: Uses recent history from this browser’s question bank practice. Access rules still apply on the server.
learner.qbank.filters.modeExam: Exam style (hide rationale until you open it)
learner.qbank.filters.noMistakesBody: Answer a few questions first, or turn off “Mistakes only” to load the full bank.
learner.qbank.empty.bankEmptyGlobal.body: Wala pang nai-publish na mga item sa question bank. Isa itong content gap, hindi ang iyong subscription. Makipag-ugnayan sa suporta kung inaasahan mo ang data dito.
learner.qbank.empty.bankEmptyGlobal.titl: Wala pang nai-publish na mga tanong
learner.qbank.empty.default.body: Subukan ang isa pang paksa, i-clear ang mga filter, o i-refresh. Kung nag-subscribe ka kamakailan, maghintay ng ilang sandali at subukang muli.
learner.qbank.empty.default.title: Walang tanong sa view na ito
learner.qbank.empty.entitlementExcludesA: Umiiral ang mga nai-publish na tanong, ngunit walang tumutugma sa bansa at tier ng iyong account. Tingnan ang iyong bansa sa profile at plano, o makipag-ugnayan sa suporta.
Walang mga tanong na tumutugma sa iyong profile
learner.qbank.empty.indeterminate.body: Walang laman ang listahan para sa hindi karaniwang dahilan. Subukang i-clear ang mga filter, pagkatapos ay i-refresh. Kung magpapatuloy ito, makipag-ugnayan sa suporta sa oras na sinubukan mo.
learner.qbank.empty.indeterminate.title: Walang tanong sa view na ito
learner.qbank.empty.pathwayNotOnPlan.bod: Ang pathway na iyon ay hindi kasama sa iyong subscription, kaya hindi ito inilapat bilang isang filter. I-clear ang pathway filter o upgrade. Kung walang laman pa rin ang listahan, nalalapat pa rin ang dahilan sa ibaba.
learner.qbank.empty.pathwayNotOnPlan.tit: Ang landas ay wala sa iyong plano
learner.qbank.empty.pathwayPoolEmpty.bod: May mga item ang iyong subscription, ngunit walang naka-tag para sa pathway ng pagsusulit na ito. Subukan ang "Lahat ng paksa" na walang filter ng pathway, o pumili ng ibang pathway.
learner.qbank.empty.pathwayPoolEmpty.tit: Wala para sa pathway na ito sa iyong pool
learner.qbank.empty.topicNoMatch.body: Ang filter ng paksa ay eksaktong tumutugma sa label ng database. Pumili ng isa pang paksa mula sa menu o “Lahat ng paksa”.
learner.qbank.empty.topicNoMatch.title: Walang mga tanong para sa label ng paksang ito
learner.qbank.empty.unknownPathway.body: Ang “{{pathwayId}}” ay hindi isang kinikilalang pathway ID, kaya ang bangko ay hindi saklaw dito. Alisin ang filter ng pathway o pumili ng pathway mula sa iyong hub.
learner.qbank.empty.unknownPathway.title: Hindi kilalang pathway filter
learner.qbank.gradeFailed: Hindi mamarkahan ang item na ito.
learner.qbank.networkError: Mga tanong sa paglo-load ng error sa network.
learner.qbank.notice.topicMenuTruncated: Ipinapakita ang {{cap}} pinakakaraniwang paksa sa iyong bangko ({{omitted}} higit pang tanong sa mga paksang hindi nakalista). Piliin ang "Lahat ng paksa" sa topic drill para mag-browse ng mga discovery bucket.
learner.qbank.notice.topicRelaxed: Walang eksaktong tugma para sa paksang “{{topic}}”. Nagpapakita na lang ng mga tanong para sa iyong pathway. Gamitin ang menu ng paksa upang mas paliitin.
learner.qbank.notice.weakLowConfidence: Ang mahinang lugar na pagmamapa ng paksa ay mababa ang kumpiyansa sa ngayon. Ipagpatuloy ang pagmamarka ng mga item at hihigpitan namin ang pagkakahanay ng paksa.
learner.qbank.notice.weakUnavailable: Nangangailangan muna ng ilang graded na item ang weak-area mode. Nagpapakita kami ng halo-halong pool hanggang sa ma-populate ang iyong topic ledger.
learner.qbank.pickTopic.body: Pumili ng paksa mula sa menu sa ibaba para magsimula ng pagsusulit na batay sa paksa (una sa mga kamakailang item).
learner.qbank.pickTopic.title: Pumili ng paksa
learner.qbank.ui.batchProgressNote: Ang pag-unlad para sa batch na ito ay naka-save sa iyong browser upang maaari kang mag-refresh at magpatuloy. Ibinubukod ng mga random at mixed mode ang mga tanong na nakita mo na sa session na ito kapag nag-load ka pa. Ang pagmamarka ay tumatakbo sa server. Ang mga sagot ay hindi namarkahan sa pahina lamang.
learner.qbank.ui.examShellHint: Exam-style session: ang mga paliwanag ay mananatiling nakatago hanggang sa piliin mo, tulad ng closed-book pacing (practice lang).
learner.qbank.ui.learningHigh: Malakas na tugma mula sa metadata ng item na ito. Ang mga susunod na hakbang ay dapat manatili sa parehong track ng paksa.
learner.qbank.ui.learningLow: Tinatayang pagruruta lang. Buksan ang question bank at ibagay ang mga filter kung ang mga resulta ay mukhang off-target.
learner.qbank.ui.learningMedium: Niruta mula sa paksa ng tanong; kung sa tingin ng bangko ay malawak, makitid na may mga filter o ang iyong priority review queue.
learner.qbank.ui.sessionLineIdle: Sagutin at suriin upang masubaybayan ang session na ito
learner.qbank.ui.topicCodeLine: Code ng paksa: {{code}} · kumpiyansa sa pagruruta {{confidence}}
learner.questions.howTo.footer: Ang mga premium na item at mga katwiran ay para sa indibidwal na paggamit ng subscriber. Limitado ang pagkopya sa screen; gamitin ang Aking mga tala para sa teksto na maaari mong i-print o i-export.
learner.questions.howTo.integratedLoop: Misses here feed your weak-topic signals and can surface matched pathway lessons on the dashboard—keep lessons and bank practice in the same loop for faster gains.
learner.questions.howTo.li1: Pumili ng mga sagot, pagkatapos ay gamitin ang Suriin ang sagot para sa agarang feedback.
learner.questions.howTo.li2: Ipares sa mga pagsusulit sa Practice kapag gusto mong may oras, full-set na rehearsal.
learner.questions.howTo.li3a: Para sa mas parang pagsusulit sa bank session (nakatago ang mga paliwanag hanggang sa mag-opt in ka), magdagdag
learner.questions.howTo.li3b: sa URL ng pahinang ito, o gamitin
learner.questions.howTo.title: Paano gamitin ang bangkong ito
learner.questions.subtitle.locked: Magsanay nang may mga katwiran pagkatapos ng bawat item, mga filter ng paksa, at session-friendly na pagsusuri, kasama ng isang aktibong plano.
learner.questions.subtitle.subscriber: Sagutin ang mga item sa MCQ at SATA, suriin ang iyong trabaho laban sa opisyal na susi, at basahin ang mga katwiran. Gamitin ang filter ng paksa upang mag-drill ng mga mahihinang lugar. Ang pag-unlad para sa session na ito ay naka-save sa iyong browser.
learner.questions.title: Bangko ng tanong
learner.pathway.missingBanner.body: We could not match an exam pathway to your subscription yet. Confirm your study track and region in study preferences, or check that your plan includes RN, PN/LPN/RPN, NP, or allied content.
learner.pathway.missingBanner.title: Set your exam pathway to unlock pathway filters
learner.practiceTests.historyEmpty: No saved practice tests yet. Build one above, or warm up in the question bank first.
learner.studyLoop.afterCatLead: Suggested order so you always know what to do next:
learner.studyLoop.afterCatNoReadiness: Keep practicing; readiness appears once you have enough graded sessions and mocks.
learner.studyLoop.allCorrectThisSet: Strong set—no misses to remediate here. Run a timed CAT or mixed mock next.
learner.studyLoop.sessionPanelAria: Guided study loop for this question batch
learner.studyLoop.sessionTitle: End of this batch — what’s next
learner.studyLoop.signInProgressHint: to save progress on this lesson.
learner.studyLoop.stepCat: Run an adaptive (CAT-style) practice test on weak areas
learner.studyLoop.stepLessons: Review lessons for topics that are still shaky
learner.studyLoop.stepQuestions: Drill questions on your weakest topic from this run
learner.studyLoop.subscribePathwayHint: Subscribe with a plan that matches this exam pathway to track completion.
learner.studyPlan.subtitle.locked: Ang iyong petsa ng pagsusulit, ritmo, at mga signal ng pagsasanay ay humihimok ng mga lingguhang target at mga rekomendasyon sa Susunod na Pag-aaral kapag mayroon kang aktibong plano.
learner.studyPlan.subtitle.subscriber: Ang iyong petsa ng pagsusulit, ritmo, at mga signal ng pagsasanay ay humihimok ng mga lingguhang target at checkpoint. Ang opsyonal na lingguhang istruktura ng AI ay nabubuhay pa rin sa ibaba. Paganahin gamit ang `AI_STUDY_PLAN_ENABLED=true` kapag na-configure. Hindi medikal na payo.

pages.alliedHealthHub.footerNursingPathw: Looking for NCLEX or NP instead? Browse nursing and advanced practice pathways.
pages.alliedHealthHub.heroH1: Certification prep for your discipline, not a generic nursing page
pages.alliedHealthHub.heroTestimonial: Allied candidates tell us the stems feel closer to registry exams than random quiz banks.
pages.alliedHealthHub.heroValueLine: Practice exam-style questions, review key protocols, and focus on the concepts most likely to appear on your certification exam.
pages.alliedHealthHub.heroWorkflowLine: Start with a topic, review the concept, then apply it with practice questions and timed sets.
pages.alliedHealthHub.metaDescription: Certification prep for respiratory therapy, medical laboratory, imaging, paramedic, pharmacy technician, rehabilitation, and related allied credentials. Choose your country and profession. Lessons and practice stay on the allied subscription tier.
pages.alliedHealthHub.metaTitle: Allied health certification prep | RT, MLT, paramedic & more | NurseNest
pages.alliedHealthHub.professionsIntro: Each track pairs a prep guide with a paginated lesson hub. Questions, lessons, and timed sets stay inside the allied tier, separate from NCLEX and NP depth.

pages.alliedHealthHub.trustTile2Body: United States and Canada each have a dedicated allied hub so entitlements and checkout match your exam market.
pages.alliedHealthHub.trustTile3Body: Lessons, questions, and practice stay inside the allied plan you select. Upgrade paths are explicit, not mixed in by accident.
pages.alliedHealthHub.whoBody: Built for allied health certifications such as respiratory therapy, paramedic, medical laboratory, imaging, and rehabilitation pathways.

pages.examLessons.intro: Every hub below is scoped to one country, license track, and exam. No mixed terminology, no cross-leak between NP specialties when you set your learner pathway. Start with a preview, then unlock the full lesson with a matching plan.
pages.examLessons.metaDescription: Browse nursing lessons by country, role, and exam track (REx-PN, NCLEX-RN, NCLEX-PN, NP specialties, and more). Previews are free; full depth unlocks with the matching subscription.
pages.forInstitutions.audience3: Program directors and faculty evaluating digital exam-prep for cohorts
pages.forInstitutions.description: Volume licensing and cohort access for nursing schools, programs, and healthcare education teams using NurseNest Core.
pages.forInstitutions.h1: Institutional pricing for programs and schools
pages.forInstitutions.intro: Give your cohort the same NCLEX-RN, REx-PN, NP, and allied exam prep as individual subscribers—with seat-based access, rollout options, and terms sized to your program.
pages.forInstitutions.nextBody: Share your program type, estimated learner count, and timeline—we will follow up with pricing and rollout options. For single learners, individual plans stay on the main pricing page.
pages.forInstitutions.offer1: Seat-based licensing aligned to cohort size and term length
pages.forInstitutions.offer2: Pathway-aligned tiers (RPN/LVN, RN, NP, allied health) matching public individual plans
pages.forInstitutions.offer3: Enrollment workflows such as domain verification or invite codes, depending on your agreement

pages.forInstitutions.offer5: Onboarding support for program administrators and faculty contacts

pages.pricing.billing.helper: Tinutulungan ka ng mga kabuuan na ihambing ang mga matitipid sa termino; Ipinapakita ng Stripe ang eksaktong singil bago ka magbayad. Maaari kang lumipat ng termino sa pag-renew kung saan pinapayagan ng iyong plano.
pages.pricing.billing.recurringDisclosur: Awtomatikong nagre-renew ang mga subscription hanggang sa magkansela ka. Ipinapakita ng Stripe ang ritmo ng pag-renew, presyo, at susunod na petsa ng pagsingil bago ka magbayad. Ang mga panuntunan sa pagkansela at refund ay nasa aming patakaran sa subscription at refund.

pages.pricing.faq.0.a: Plans are sold by pathway tier (for example RN, PN, NP, or Allied) and country. After purchase, that tier unlocks the matching question bank, lessons, and practice modes for that registration context.
pages.pricing.faq.1.a: Yes. NurseNest uses Stripe for checkout and subscription management. You can update payment methods and cancel from the billing portal.
pages.pricing.faq.2.a: Refunds follow the subscription and refund policy linked at checkout. If you have a billing issue, contact support with your account email.
pages.pricing.faq.3.a: Your bank stays scoped to the tier you bought. Switching tracks usually means a new plan that matches the new pathway.
pages.pricing.faq.3.q: Can I change exam tracks later?
pages.pricing.faq.4.a: Use timed sets when your accuracy is stable on topics, then full practice exams for pacing. The app highlights weak categories so your next block targets risk, not comfort.
pages.pricing.faq.4.q: How should I use practice exams?
pages.pricing.faqSection.title: Pricing questions
pages.pricing.get.b0: A pathway-scoped question bank with rationales tied to safe vs unsafe options
pages.pricing.get.b1: Clinical lessons that match your tier, not a generic topic list
pages.pricing.get.b2: Timed item sets and practice exams where your plan includes them
pages.pricing.get.b3: Category signals so you rebalance weak areas instead of repeating strengths
pages.pricing.get.lead: Your subscription is built around one registration context. You get structured practice, not a random quiz feed.
pages.pricing.get.title: What you are buying
pages.pricing.h1: Pagpepresyo na tumutugma sa iyong pagsusulit—hindi isang generic na pader ng subscription

pages.pricing.hero.choicePill: Choose country, then pathway, then term
pages.pricing.hero.regionHint: Canada and United States have separate hubs so scope language and billing match your exam market.
pages.pricing.hero.subheadMain: Pick the plan that matches your exam and country. Your subscription unlocks pathway-scoped questions, lessons, and practice modes for that registration context.
pages.pricing.hero.trustLine: Transparent pricing: you always know which pathway tier you are activating before checkout.
pages.pricing.institutionalBanner: Mga programa at paaralan: paglilisensya sa dami, mga upuan ng pangkat, at paglulunsad na madaling gamitin ng admin—tingnan ang pagpepresyo ng institusyon.
pages.pricing.intro: Piliin ang iyong landas at bansa. Pagkatapos ng pag-checkout, ina-unlock ng tier na iyon ang buong question bank, mga aralin, naka-time na session, at kasaysayan ng marka para sa konteksto ng iyong pagpaparehistro—walang paghahalo ng content mula sa iba pang mga saklaw.

pages.pricing.matrix.r2.core: Timed sets and exams where available
pages.pricing.matrix.title: Compare tiers at a glance
pages.pricing.micro.lift: When you know what to drill next, you waste less time re-reading chapters you already pass in practice.
pages.pricing.micro.marks: Missed items become review targets, not one-off mistakes.
pages.pricing.micro.worry: Most people do not fail from lack of content. They fail from unfocused repetition.

pages.pricing.narrative.rn.subhead: Pinagsama-samang mga aralin, NGN-style na pag-iisip, at kunwaring pagsusulit para sa Canada at United States.

pages.pricing.narrative.rpn.included2: Nag-time na mga pagsusulit sa pagsasanay gamit ang iyong na-filter na item pool
pages.pricing.narrative.rpn.included3: Isulong ang visibility para pag-aralan mo kung ano ang gumagalaw sa iyong marka

pages.pricing.narrative.rpn.subhead: Mga sitwasyong nasasakupan ng PN, mga katwiran na una sa kaligtasan, at mga nakatakdang set na nakahanay sa praktikal na nursing sa Canada.
pages.pricing.narrative.variant.urgencyL: Mag-lock sa isang lingguhang tanong-at-makatwirang ritmo ngayon-ang pare-parehong mga reps ay nakakatalo sa huling minutong cramming.

pages.pricing.outcomes.3-month.1: Better value than month-to-month for most candidates
pages.pricing.outcomes.3-month.2: Keeps you in timed practice through mid-prep

pages.pricing.preview.body: Naka-live ang mga set ng naka-time na item, mode ng pagsusuri, at kunwaring pagsusulit sa tabi ng iyong katumpakan sa pagtakbo at mga breakdown ng kategorya—para makita mo kung talagang bumubuti ka, hindi lang mga oras ng pag-log.
pages.pricing.productPreview.0.body: Filter and drill by topic, then read rationales that explain safe versus unsafe care.
pages.pricing.productPreview.0.title: Question bank
pages.pricing.productPreview.1.body: Structured lessons aligned to your pathway, not a random video playlist.
pages.pricing.productPreview.1.title: Lessons
pages.pricing.productPreview.2.body: Practice under time pressure when your plan includes timed modes and exams.
pages.pricing.productPreview.2.title: Timed practice
pages.pricing.productPreview.3.body: See accuracy trends and weak tags so your next session has a target.
pages.pricing.productPreview.3.title: Performance history
pages.pricing.productPreview.lead: Everything below is scoped to the tier you purchase.
pages.pricing.productPreview.title: Inside the learner shell
pages.pricing.proof.line1: Items and rationales respect your pathway scope, not a mixed bag of unrelated roles.
pages.pricing.proof.line2: Lessons and questions link into one study loop you can repeat weekly.
pages.pricing.proof.line3: Timed practice and history show whether you are improving, not just busy.
pages.pricing.proof.title: Why candidates choose NurseNest
pages.pricing.risk.b1: Drilling content you already pass while avoiding harder categories
pages.pricing.risk.b2: Splitting tools across vendors the week before the exam
pages.pricing.risk.title: Risks NurseNest helps you avoid
pages.pricing.section.outcomesHeading: Ano ang mga pagbabago sa iyong linggo ng pag-aaral
pages.pricing.social.passRateLine: Ang mga mag-aaral na nagpapanatili ng isang lingguhang ritmo—mga tanong, mga katwiran, mga naka-time na bloke—ay mas nagiging matatag habang papalapit ang kanilang petsa ng pagsusulit. Ang iyong mileage ay depende sa kung paano mo ginagamit ang bangko.
pages.pricing.social.pricingFooterLine: Sinasaklaw ng isang subscription ang bangko, mga aralin, naka-time na pagsasanay, at kasaysayan ng pagganap upang hindi mo pinagsasama-sama ang tatlong magkakaibang vendor sa linggo bago ang iyong pagsusulit.
pages.pricing.tier.freeB1: Create an account to save light progress on eligible surfaces
pages.pricing.tier.freeB2: Upgrade anytime to unlock full pathway depth
pages.pricing.tier.freeDesc: See how our rationales and workflow feel before you commit to a paid tier.
pages.pricing.tier.premiumB0: Longest terms often have the best per-month value
pages.pricing.tier.premiumB1: Keeps the full bank and lessons available across your prep arc
pages.pricing.tier.premiumB2: Best when you want one subscription through exam day
pages.pricing.tier.premiumSub: Best per-month pricing on eligible terms. Shown when a longer duration is available for your pathway.
pages.pricing.title: Pagpepresyo
pages.pricing.trust.bullet0: Secure na pag-checkout sa pamamagitan ng Stripe
pages.pricing.trust.bullet1: Binuo para sa mga konteksto ng pagpaparehistro sa Canada at US
pages.pricing.trust.bullet2: Ang iyong bangko ng tanong ay mananatiling saklaw sa tier na binili mo—walang cross-tier leakage
pages.pricing.trust.guaranteeBody: Kung hindi ka tinutulungan ng NurseNest na mag-aral nang may mas malinaw na istraktura at mas disiplinadong pagsasanay sa unang 30 araw, makipag-ugnayan sa suporta—makikipagtulungan kami sa iyo sa isang patas na resolusyon.
pages.pricing.trustSection.lead: What learners say about staying consistent before exam day.
pages.pricing.trustSection.quote0: I finally stopped guessing what to study next. Weak categories were obvious after a few sessions.
pages.pricing.trustSection.quote1: Rationales read like my instructor: safe versus unsafe, not just letter answers.
pages.pricing.trustSection.quote2: Having lessons and questions in one place saved me from tab overload.
pages.pricing.trustSection.title: Voices from the community
pages.pricing.use.afterShiftBody: Queue a short timed block after clinical. Review rationales on miss, then one lesson tie-in.
pages.pricing.use.title: Fit study around real life
pages.pricing.use.weekendBody: Run a practice exam window, then let weak tags set Monday's drill plan.

pages.publicLessons.h1: Clinical lessons for NCLEX-RN, NCLEX-PN, REx-PN, and NP
pages.publicLessons.intro: NurseNest organizes lessons by country, license level, and exam so US and Canada candidates do not mix scope language. Open the exam you are sitting, preview topics, then subscribe for full depth when you are ready.
pages.publicLessons.introCA: Browse lessons by pathway, then move directly into practice questions and rationales tied to your exam.
pages.publicLessons.introUS: Browse lessons by pathway, then move directly into practice questions and rationales tied to your exam.
pages.publicLessons.metaDescription: Public hub for nursing exam lessons: NCLEX-RN, NCLEX-PN (US LVN/LPN), REx-PN (Canada PN), and NP tracks. Choose a pathway hub, preview content, then continue in the app.
pages.publicLessons.metaTitle: Nursing exam lessons | NCLEX-RN, NCLEX-PN, REx-PN, NP | NurseNest
pages.publicPracticeExams.catP1: Para sa mga suportadong landas, nag-aalok din ang NurseNest ng
pages.publicPracticeExams.catP2: sa app, kasama ang mga adaptive (CAT-style) session kung available ito sa produkto. Mag-iiba ang availability ayon sa landas at content pack — buksan ang mga
pages.publicPracticeExams.catP3: pagkatapos mag-sign in para makita kung ano ang kasama sa subscription. Hindi ito kapalit ng opisyal na iskedyul o patakaran ng NCLEX o board.
pages.publicPracticeExams.catP2AfterStro: practice exams in the app, including adaptive (CAT-style) sessions where the product implements them. Availability varies by pathway and content pack.
pages.publicPracticeExams.catP3Closing: Choose your track below to sign in and start a CAT-style session for that pathway. After sign-in, confirm what your subscription includes in the app. This is not a substitute for official NCLEX or board scheduling or rules.
pages.publicPracticeExams.h1: NCLEX-RN, NCLEX-PN, REx-PN, NP & Allied: timed practice exams and mock tests
pages.publicPracticeExams.intro: Sign in to run full-length timed practice exams, review attempt history, and use CAT-style practice sessions where your pathway includes them. This page explains what NurseNest includes—practice, study, and test readiness—not the official NCLEX, REx-PN, or board exam.
pages.publicPracticeExams.metaDescriptio: Practice exams (mock tests) and computer-adaptive style sessions for nursing students. Create an account to launch practice exams in the app; content is organized by RN, PN, NP, and Allied pathways.
pages.publicPracticeExams.metaTitle: NCLEX & REx-PN practice exams and mock tests | NurseNest
pages.publicPracticeExams.pathwayAlliedB: Allied: Timed practice follows allied certification framing for your hub—not nursing NCLEX content.
pages.publicPracticeExams.pathwayNpBulle: NP: Advanced practice exams are specialty-scoped (for example FNP vs PMHNP)—always enter from your NP pathway in the app.
pages.publicPracticeExams.pathwayRnPnBul: RN / PN: Practice exams and drills align to NCLEX-RN, NCLEX-PN, or REx-PN context for your region.
pages.publicPracticeExams.sectionPathway: Start from your public lessons hub if you are still choosing a track:
pages.publicPracticeExams.sectionTimedMo: Full-length or section-timed attempts with review of rationales and history—available to subscribers in the app for their entitled pathway. Use this when you want exam-day pacing and a score-oriented pass.
Mga may oras na pagsasanay na pagsusulit

paywall.dashboard.intro: Ang dashboard ay nagpapakita ng access status para sa lahat; ang mga subscriber ay may readiness, streaks, planner, weak-topic nudges, at continue-where-you-left-off shortcuts.
paywall.dashboard.lose0: Pinagsamang readiness at suggested next steps sa mga session
paywall.dashboard.lose2: Weak-area flashcard at drill nudges mula sa mga mali mo
paywall.dashboard.progress: May aktibidad ka na sa account na ito. Mag-upgrade para gawing daily hub ito na may naka-save na signals, hindi banner lang.
paywall.dashboard.title: I-unlock ang buong access
paywall.exams.intro: Ang mga timed practice exam ay nagmumula sa server-side pool ng tier mo. Sa checkout, puwede ang buong haba ng attempts, autosave, at score history.
paywall.exams.lose0: Buong-habang timed sessions na may attempt review
paywall.exams.lose1: Score history at pacing na tumutugma sa authorization-to-test timing
paywall.exams.lose2: Mga naka-save na pagsasanay na pagsusulit na nakatali sa pathway mo
paywall.exams.progress: Kapag aktibo ang plano mo, lalabas agad dito ang mga bagong pagsasanay na pagsusulit pagkatapos ng checkout.
paywall.exams.title: I-unlock ang buong access
paywall.footerHint: Karamihan sa mga handa na sa exam ay naghalo ng steady na practice questions, buong rationales, at kahit isang buong pagsasanay na pagsusulit sa mga linggo bago ang petsa — hindi isang bagsakan lang.
paywall.lessons.intro: Ang lesson previews ay nagpapakita ng istruktura; ang mga subscriber ay nakakakuha ng buong body, module progress, at lesson pool na tumutugma sa pathway mo.
paywall.lessons.lose0: Buong lesson content lampas sa preview limits
paywall.lessons.lose1: Completion tracking at resume sa mga module
paywall.lessons.lose2: Cross-lesson sequences na naka-align sa scope ng exam mo
paywall.lessons.progress: Ang mga preview modules na binuksan mo ay bilang pa rin sa study story mo. Mag-upgrade para mapanatili ang progreso at lalim.
paywall.lessons.title: I-unlock ang buong access
paywall.questions.intro: Ang preview at may limit na runs ay nagpapakita ng interface; ang paid tier ay nag-u-unlock ng pathway-scoped pool, buong rationales sa bawat opsyon, weak-area routing, at cross-device history.
paywall.questions.lose0: Buong rationales at review history para sa bawat item na nasubukan mo
paywall.questions.lose1: Unlimited o tier-scoped bank access (hindi preview caps)
paywall.questions.lose2: Category analytics na nananatili sa session at device
paywall.questions.progress: Nagsimula ka na. Bilang ang mga kamakailang attempt mo. Mag-upgrade para mapanatili ang weak-topic lists, streaks, at buong review sa halip na mawala ang lalim pagkatapos ng bawat preview.
paywall.questions.title: I-unlock ang buong access
programmatic.hub.heading: Your study hub
programmatic.hub.sub: Same pathway as this guide—open lessons, drill the question bank, then run CAT-style adaptive practice. Sign in when you are ready to save progress.
programmatic.hub.cardCatDesc: Adaptive practice matched to your exam track
programmatic.midCta.title: Start practicing now
programmatic.midCta.sub: Put this guide to work—open your pathway question bank, or create a free account to track sessions.
programmatic.finalCta.title: Keep momentum after you finish reading

tools.transfusionSafety.intro: Tap the best immediate action. Rationales summarize what to watch for on exams and on the unit.
tools.transfusionSafety.metaDescription: Practice identifying transfusion reactions and first-line nursing responses.
tools.transfusionSafety.opt2a: Rising free hemoglobin or plasma hemoglobin with decreasing haptoglobin (with clinical correlation).
tools.transfusionSafety.opt2b: Isolated platelet count drop without other signs.
tools.transfusionSafety.optA: Stop the transfusion, keep IV access with normal saline, and notify the provider and blood bank per protocol.
tools.transfusionSafety.optB: Slow the infusion to 50 mL/hr and continue monitoring.
tools.transfusionSafety.optC: Give antipyretics and continue the transfusion if vital signs stabilize.
tools.transfusionSafety.q1: A patient develops fever, chills, and flank pain 45 minutes into a red blood cell transfusion. What is your priority?
tools.transfusionSafety.q2: You suspect acute hemolytic transfusion reaction. Which lab pair best supports hemolysis in this context?
tools.transfusionSafety.rationale1: Febrile or hemolytic suspicion requires stopping the blood product, maintaining patent IV access with saline, monitoring, and escalation—before restarting anything.
tools.transfusionSafety.rationale2: Hemolysis releases free hemoglobin and consumes haptoglobin; always interpret with the clinical picture and institutional transfusion reaction pathway.

exams.china.metaTitle: Nursing sa China: National Nurse Qualification Exam at Trabaho Abroad (2026 Guide)
exams.china.metaDescription: China nursing exam, National Health Commission, computer-based test, at mga pathway patungong Canada, US, UK.
exams.china.title: Nursing sa China: National Nurse Qualification Exam at Trabaho Abroad (2026 Guide)
exams.china.lead: Pinapatakbo ng China ang pambansang kwalipikasyon sa pamamagitan ng computer-based na eksaminasyon. Ang pahinang ito ay nagbibigay ng pangkalahatang balangkas at mga susunod na hakbang para sa mga naghahanda para sa NCLEX o abroad.
exams.china.sections.overview.title: Nursing in China: national licensure pathway
exams.china.sections.overview.body:
China’s nurse licensing conversation usually refers to completing an approved nursing education programme, satisfying internship or practice requirements announced for your cohort, and passing the National Nurse Qualification Examination as part of practice eligibility discussions. After a pass, candidates follow administrative registration steps published for their context.

National policy direction and health workforce oversight are commonly associated with the National Health Commission (NHC) in public materials; examination administration details appear through authorised examination and health authority channels. Always treat Chinese-language bulletins and the official candidate portal as authoritative for dates, fees, and identity rules.

NurseNest summarizes widely discussed mechanics for internationally mobile readers comparing systems—it is not legal advice and not a substitute for official Chinese sources.
exams.china.sections.nurseNestCovers.tit: What NurseNest covers (and what it does not)
exams.china.sections.nurseNestCovers.bod:
NurseNest does not mirror, copy, or reproduce proprietary NNQE item banks or any other protected national examination content. Practice in the product is aligned to public exam scope for NCLEX-oriented pathways when a US or Canadian board authorises you to test, and is based on NurseNest’s own lesson and question inventory.

By nursing domain, you will find depth across safety, pharmacology, adult and critical care, maternal-child, mental health, and ethics—supporting transferable clinical reasoning that may overlap conceptually with your China training without claiming to clone Chinese administration items.

For NNQE administration, eligibility, and blueprint fidelity, rely on authorised Chinese bulletins and your school. NCLEX comparison on NurseNest is secondary to China-first domestic context in this hub.
exams.china.sections.languageHonesty.tit: Languages in the product and in this content library
exams.china.sections.languageHonesty.bod:
Clinical NCLEX-style preparation in NurseNest is English-first. Simplified Chinese (zh) and Traditional Chinese (zh-tw) receive partial marketing and blog support where keys exist; Arabic, Tagalog, and Hindi overlays in the manifest are primarily English fallback for hub navigation unless a locale bundle fully translates a key.

Manifest-planned blog batches may label entries by language code for editorial routing; generated long-form HTML may still be English for clinical terminology unless a separate translation pipeline publishes. Do not assume every zh/zh-tw/ar/hi/tl row is fully localized until you verify published posts.

Medical terminology remains English in most international exam preparation surfaces by design.
exams.china.sections.nnqe.title: National Nurse Qualification Examination (NNQE)
exams.china.sections.nnqe.body:
The NNQE is the flagship computer-based qualifying examination pathway that nursing graduates and eligible candidates use when discussing nurse practice access under China’s national health professional examination system. Items are aligned to published syllabi; formats and weighting evolve—download the bulletin for your exact sitting.

Eligibility is cohort-specific: recognised education completion, required internship or practice documentation, identity consistency, and any additional conditions announced for your application cycle must match what you submit online.

Outcomes are reported through official channels; a pass feeds into subsequent qualification and registration steps as defined administratively. Retake intervals, annual windows, and cooling-off rules change—read the notice for your year.

If you are also preparing for NCLEX-RN, keep two study systems: NNQE materials for domestic rules; NurseNest RN lessons and questions for US-style clinical judgement practice.
exams.china.sections.regulator.title: Regulator structure, eligibility, and what “passing” means
exams.china.sections.regulator.body:
Candidates typically encounter three layers in explanations: national health administration policy direction, examination organisation through authorised national examination channels, and local or institutional steps after results. Your school’s counselling office and employer HR teams may add checklists—treat them as supplements to official bulletins.

Eligibility audits commonly review transcripts, internship completion, identification, and ethical conduct declarations. International students or cross-province applicants should pay extra attention to documentation consistency.

“Passing” the NNQE is a major milestone but not the entire story: follow-through registration, continuing education expectations, and employer onboarding may still apply.

NurseNest does not interpret Chinese regulatory notices for your specific case—verify with authoritative Chinese sources.
exams.china.sections.domesticVsIntl.titl: Domestic pathway vs international nurse migration
exams.china.sections.domesticVsIntl.body:
Domestic pathway: finish recognised education, meet practice requirements, pass the NNQE, then complete registration steps defined in Chinese administrative materials for your jurisdiction and employer context.

International migration: target-country regulators assess your education and practice history, English or other language tests, possible competency exams, and visa/employer steps. A Chinese licence and examination pass are supporting evidence—they rarely substitute for a foreign regulator’s entire checklist.

Planning both tracks at once is common: keep calendars separate (NNQE bulletin dates vs NCLEX eligibility timelines), and keep document names consistent across transcripts, passports, and registration certificates.

NurseNest focuses on transferable clinical reasoning for exams like NCLEX when the United States or Canada is your objective.
exams.china.sections.allied.title: Allied health pathways (where relevant)
exams.china.sections.allied.body:
China’s health workforce includes multiple professions with separate national examination and registration systems. Nursing candidates should avoid mixing allied health rumours into NNQE preparation—use the bulletin that matches your profession.

If you are also exploring international allied routes, compare country-specific competency and language rules; NurseNest hosts Allied Health hubs for US/Canada study modes separate from nursing.
exams.china.sections.migrationCanada.tit: China to Canada: nursing registration highlights
exams.china.sections.migrationCanada.bod:
Canada assesses internationally educated nurses province by province. Expect credential evaluation, possible bridging education, English or French thresholds, and employer-sponsored pathways that vary by stream.

Your China education and licensure history become evidence in a gap analysis—not automatic reciprocity. Start early on notarised translations and name harmonisation.

NurseNest offers NCLEX-RN–style practice frequently used by internationally trained nurses; align any study with your college’s current checklist.
Australia’s nursing registration sits with the Nursing and Midwifery Board of Australia under the national scheme; English evidence, qualification assessment, and sometimes additional requirements apply to internationally educated applicants.

China’s domestic NNQE does not replace Australian evidence rules. Budget for assessment fees, possible bridging, and timeline uncertainty.

Use NurseNest’s Australia exam hub for big-picture orientation alongside official Ahpra materials.
exams.china.sections.migrationUk.title: China to the United Kingdom: NMC registration
exams.china.sections.migrationUk.body:
The Nursing and Midwifery Council (NMC) evaluates education, registration history, English proficiency, and where applicable Test of Competence components. UK rules are independent of China’s NNQE.

Prepare certified translations, verify English test validity windows, and plan for possible skills assessment costs.

NurseNest supports NCLEX-style reasoning practice for nurses also targeting the United States; NMC processes remain separate.
exams.china.sections.migrationGulf.title: China to Gulf states: licensing and exams
exams.china.sections.migrationGulf.body:
Gulf jurisdictions often use health authority licensing, dataflow-style primary source verification, and Prometric-style assessments depending on role and emirate. Requirements change frequently—verify with the target regulator and your employer’s credentialing team.

Chinese licence evidence may help demonstrate professional standing but does not remove local exams or Arabic/English thresholds where required.

See NurseNest’s Middle East exam hub for Prometric and Gulf orientation pages.
exams.china.sections.abroad.title: United States and cross-border mobility (summary)
exams.china.sections.abroad.body:
United States: CGFNS-related services may apply depending on state board rules; English proficiency; NCLEX-RN eligibility through a state board of nursing remains the common RN entry assessment culture.

Canada, Australia, and the UK are detailed in the sections above. Wherever you aim, build a single document vault with consistent spelling, transcripts, and registration certificates.

NurseNest provides NCLEX-RN lessons and questions used by internationally educated nurses worldwide.
exams.china.sections.best.title: Checklist: domestic exam vs abroad plan
exams.china.sections.best.body:
1) Download the NNQE bulletin for your cycle and confirm eligibility line-by-line.

2) Keep internship and practice evidence ready in the formats the portal requests.

3) If targeting NCLEX, schedule English tests with validity that matches board rules.

4) For Canada/Australia/UK/Gulf, start credential evaluation research early and budget translation costs.

5) Separate study blocks so NNQE blueprint content does not blur into NCLEX item styles.

6) Use qualified advisers for immigration steps—NurseNest focuses on exam reasoning skills.
exams.china.sections.links.title: Study tools and parallel NCLEX practice
exams.china.sections.links.body: Use the quick links below for lessons, question banks, and study plans. NNQE preparation remains anchored in official Chinese materials; NurseNest’s English resources help when your parallel goal is US-style NCLEX clinical judgement.
exams.china.sections.blogIntegration.bod: Long-form China nursing guides publish on a schedule from the blog manifest—tagged for discovery. Browse the tag to see titles as batches import; featured cards below highlight common entry points.
exams.china.paginationNote: China nursing articles ship in paginated batches from `china-nursing-200.manifest.json`; this hub uses ISR for a fast shell.
exams.china.sections.faq.title: Frequently asked questions
exams.china.faq.q1: What is the National Nurse Qualification Examination (NNQE)?
exams.china.faq.a1: It is the widely recognised national qualifying examination pathway for nurse practice eligibility discussions in China, typically computer-based with multiple-choice style items; confirm the current bulletin for your cohort.
exams.china.faq.q2: Who oversees nursing policy at the national level in public materials?
exams.china.faq.a2: The National Health Commission is commonly cited for national health administration direction; examination administration details appear through authorised examination channels.
exams.china.faq.q3: Is China’s NNQE the same as NCLEX?
exams.china.faq.a3: No. NCLEX is the US/Canadian RN/PN entry licensing assessment culture. China’s NNQE follows Chinese syllabi and administrative rules.
exams.china.faq.q4: Can NurseNest replace official Chinese NNQE materials?
exams.china.faq.a4: No. NurseNest supports transferable clinical reasoning for exams like NCLEX; official Chinese bulletins and authorised materials remain primary for NNQE preparation.
exams.china.faq.q5: How do Chinese-trained nurses prepare for NCLEX-RN?
exams.china.faq.a5: Plan English tests, credential evaluation where required, state board eligibility, and sustained practice with NCLEX-style items—parallel to, not mixed with, NNQE study unless your schedule deliberately separates blocks.
exams.china.faq.q6: What is different about registering in Canada vs the United States?
exams.china.faq.a6: Canada is province-by-province with college-specific gap analysis; the US uses state boards and NCLEX eligibility. Both require evidence packages and often English tests.
exams.china.faq.q7: Does passing the NNQE automatically register me in Australia or the UK?
exams.china.faq.a7: No. Australia (Ahpra/NMBA) and the UK (NMC) have independent evidence, English, and possible competency test requirements.
exams.china.faq.q8: What should I know about Gulf licensing?
exams.china.faq.a8: Requirements vary by country and employer; dataflow verification and authority exams are common. Verify current regulator notices.
exams.china.faq.a9: National materials have emphasized computer-based delivery in recent cycles; confirm modalities in the official notice for your sitting.
exams.china.faq.q10: What if I fail the NNQE?
exams.china.faq.a10: Retake policies are cycle-specific—read official guidance on resitting, waiting periods, and fees.
exams.china.faq.q11: Do I need English for the NNQE itself?
exams.china.faq.a11: Domestic administration language expectations are defined in Chinese official materials. English tests matter primarily for international pathways (e.g., NCLEX, NMC, Ahpra).
exams.china.faq.q12: Where should I read authoritative updates?
exams.china.faq.a12: National Health Commission and authorised examination authority publications in Chinese. NurseNest does not publish binding regulatory updates for China.
exams.china.faq.q13: How do allied health exams relate to nursing?
exams.china.faq.a13: Different professions have different national examinations—do not assume allied rumours apply to NNQE eligibility.
exams.china.faq.q14: Can I study for NNQE and NCLEX at the same time?
exams.china.faq.a14: Many candidates do, but use separate calendars and materials to avoid blueprint confusion.
exams.china.faq.q15: How do blog articles relate to this hub?
exams.china.faq.a15: Planned long-form posts use the China nursing manifest for batched imports; tags help you browse without slowing the hub.
